title: Crisp Shrimp Tacos
description: A quick and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring succulent shrimp, crispy tortillas, and crunchy toppings.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
4. Assemble the tacos by placing a few cooked shrimp onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of veracruzan sauce and a sprinkle of xtra crispy tortilla chips.
5. Top with crunchy lettuce, fried cilantro, and a dollop of crisp diced tomatoes.
